📅 Day of Procedure

  • Clear liquids only after 2 PM the day before. No solid food.
  • Keep your child well-hydrated — offer small sips of clear liquids every 30–60 minutes through the prep day. Each drink: no more than {{HTML_DRINK_CUP}}. Frequent small drinks beat occasional large ones — better hydration, easier on the stomach.
  • Stop all clear liquids {{NPO_CLEARS_HOURS}} hours before the procedure.
  • Bring comfort items for your child (toy, blanket, tablet, etc.).
